---
name: Feature suggestion
about: Suggest a new feature or scenario for BDD.md
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: agent-input
assignees: ''
---

**What feature would you like?**
Describe the behaviour you want the system to have.

**Suggested BDD scenario (optional)**
```gherkin
Scenario: [name]
    Given [precondition]
    When [action]
    Then [expected outcome]
```

**Why is this useful?**
Who benefits and how?
